examples: She did up the kitchen last year.
He's doing up his apartment for sale.
She did up her dress before the party.
Do up your seatbelt before we start.
We need to do up this room.
They're doing up the old house.
They did up the restaurant before reopening.
He did up his shoes quickly.
The buttons are hard to do up.
Do up your coat, it's cold outside.
example_translate: Она обновила кухню в прошлом году.
Он ремонтирует свою квартиру для продажи.
do up.synonyms:
Застёгивать (одежду, обувь) - fasten, button, zip
Ремонтировать, обновлять (здание, комнату) - renovate, refurbish, restore
